zh.lifeSummary: 當Cynwrig ap Iorwerth於1122年出生在威爾士時，他的父親Iorwerth ap Gwygan23歲，母親Gwenllian Rhirid20歲。他於1161年與Angharad verch Hwfa在英國威爾斯可爾德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1196年5月4日在他的家鄉享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cynwrig ap Iorwerth于1122年出生在威尔士时，他的父亲Iorwerth ap Gwygan23岁，母亲Gwenllian Rhirid20岁。他于1161年与Angharad verch Hwfa在英国威尔斯可爾德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1196年5月4日在他的家乡享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

en.lifeSummary: When Cynwrig ap Iorwerth was born in 1122, in Wales, his father, Iorwerth ap Gwygan, was 23 and his mother, Gwenllian Rhirid, was 20. He married Angharad verch Hwfa in 1161, in Clwyd, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 4 May 1196, in his hometown, at the age of 74.

fr.Of Betws-yn-Rhos, Denbighshire, Wales: Betws-yn-rhos, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.Betws-yn-rhos, Denbighshire, Wales, Unit: Betws-yn-rhos, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cynwrig ap Iorwerth est né en 1122, à Galles, son père, Iorwerth ap Gwygan, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian Rhirid, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Angharad verch Hwfa en 1161, à Clwyd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 4 mai 1196, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cynwrig ap Iorwerth 1122 in Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Iorwerth ap Gwygan 23 und seine Mutter Gwenllian Rhirid 20. Er hat 1161 in Clwyd, Wales, United Kingdom Angharad verch Hwfa geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 4. Mai 1196 im Alter von 74 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cynwrig ap Iorwerth è nato il nel 1122 nel Galles, il suo padre, Iorwerth ap Gwygan, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian Rhirid, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Angharad verch Hwfa nel 1161, nel Clwyd, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 4 maggio 1196, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cynwrig ap Iorwerthが1122年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Iorwerth ap Gwyganは23歳，母Gwenllian Rhiridは20歳であった。1161年にイギリスウェールズクルウイドでAngharad verch Hwfaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1196年5月4日に故郷で74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cynwrig ap Iorwerth(이)가 1122년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Iorwerth ap Gwygan(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian Rhirid(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1161년 영국 웨일스 클w이드에서 Angharad verch Hwfa(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1196년 5월 4일 그의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Angharad verch Hwfa em 1161, em Clwyd, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 4 de maio de 1196, em sua cidade natal, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cynwrig ap Iorwerth родился в 1122 г. в местности Уэльс, его отцу по имени Iorwerth ap Gwygan было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian Rhirid, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Angharad verch Hwfa в 1161 г. в местности клвид, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 4 мая 1196 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 74 лет.

Se casó con Angharad verch Hwfa en 1161, en Clwyd, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 4 de mayo de 1196, en su pueblo, a la edad de 74 años.
